texto: It seems like women are always in the kitchen around food and they're serving and they're giving and they're enjoying and it's part of the plentitude of life and the enrichment of life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kathy Bates: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “It seems like women are always in the kitchen around food and they're serving and they're giving …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, food, seems pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
